member.name: T:PDFiumCoreDemo.UnmanagedMemoryManager`1
member.summary: A MemoryManager over a raw pointer
member.remarks: The pointer is assumed to be fully unmanaged, or externally pinned - no attempt will be made to pin this data

member.name: M:PDFiumCoreDemo.UnmanagedMemoryManager`1.#ctor(System.Span{`0})
member.summary: Create a new UnmanagedMemoryManager instance at the given pointer and size
member.remarks: It is assumed that the span provided is already unmanaged or externally pinned

member.name: M:PDFiumCoreDemo.UnmanagedMemoryManager`1.#ctor(`0*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new UnmanagedMemoryManager instance at the given pointer and size

member.name: M:PDFiumCoreDemo.UnmanagedMemoryManager`1.GetSpan
member.summary: Obtains a span that represents the region

member.name: M:PDFiumCoreDemo.UnmanagedMemoryManager`1.Pin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Provides access to a pointer that represents the data (note: no actual pin occurs)

member.name: M:PDFiumCoreDemo.UnmanagedMemoryManager`1.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases all resources associated with this object

member.name: F:PDFiumCoreDemo.FPDFBitmapFormat.Gray
member.summary: Gray scale bitmap, one byte per pixel.

member.name: F:PDFiumCoreDemo.FPDFBitmapFormat.BGR
member.summary: 3 bytes per pixel, byte order: blue, green, red.

member.name: F:PDFiumCoreDemo.FPDFBitmapFormat.BGRx
member.summary: 4 bytes per pixel, byte order: blue, green, red, unused.

member.name: F:PDFiumCoreDemo.FPDFBitmapFormat.BGRA
member.summary: 4 bytes per pixel, byte order: blue, green, red, alpha.
